title: After the Satsuki Sho: Next Time for Sure!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And Mihono Bourbon finishes in first place!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I told you Mihono Bourbon was amazing! She
might even have a serious chance at the Triple
Crown!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: That was awesome, Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Mission complete.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My next target is the Japanese Derby.
Formulating strategy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
(Incredible... She just sent a wave of excitement
through the crowd!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Bourbon really is something else...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Maaan, I still couldn't show what I'm really made
of!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I thought I gave it everything I had, so what the
heck?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear that this year's Satsuki Sho was a
resounding victory for Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess that's the Classic Triple Crown tour
for you... Everyone sure was fierce...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I'm still just getting started! I may have lost
my chance at the Triple Crown, but the tour's not
over yet.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And now that I've seen Bourbon run up close, I've
got a decent feel for how she runs.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So... it'll be fine! I still have a chance to win the
Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, not so far away...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I couldn't do it... I'm still not good enough...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sob!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I can't change like this... I have so, so, sooo much
work to do before...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Before the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Rice... She sure looked determined, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon was amazing in the Satsuki Sho today,
sure, but now that I think about it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Rice was awesome today too in her own way!
Like, bam! Wowza!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I think she's going to go even harder in the
Japanese Derby and the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I really can't afford to let up. So it's time to put in
the work!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: First things first! Let's go eat some ramen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Because I'm starving!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, we go inside the first ramen shop we
come across and get our slurp on.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! More noodles, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We recharge and shift our focus to the upcoming
Japanese Derby!
